channel.title: Audio & Video on
channel.description: Recent content in Audio & Video on

item.title: Shotcut
item.description: Free, open source, cross-platform video editor

item.title: Nuclear
item.description: Streaming music player that finds free music for you

item.title: Wora
item.description: A beautiful player for audiophiles.

item.title: museeks
item.description: A simple, clean and cross-platform music player

item.title: Ossia Score
item.description: ossia score is a sequencer for audio-visual artists, designed to create interactive shows.

item.title: Kdenlive
item.description: Free and Open Source Video Editor

item.title: SMPlayer
item.description: Free Media Player with built-in codecs

item.title: OpenShot
item.description: OpenShot Video Editor is an award-winning free and open-source video editor

item.title: MuseScore
item.description: MuseScore is an open source and free music notation software

item.title: MusE
item.description: MusE is a digital audio workstation with support for both Audio and MIDI

item.title: Freac
item.description: Free and open source audio converter

item.title: Feishin
item.description: A modern self-hosted music player

item.title: Flacon
item.description: Extracts audio tracks from an audio CD image to separate tracks.

item.title: Lossless-cut
item.description: Simple and ultra fast cross platform tool for lossless trimming/cutting of video and audio files.

item.title: Cinelerra GG
item.description: Cinelerra GG Infinity is a free and open source video editing software for Linux

item.title: Audacity
item.description: Easy-to-use, multi-track audio editor and recorder

item.title: Giada
item.description: Open source, minimalistic and hardcore music production tool

item.title: Gyroflow
item.description: Video stabilization using gyroscope data

item.title: akuse
item.description: Simple and easy to use anime streaming desktop app without ads.

item.title: muffon
item.description: Advanced multi-source music streaming

item.title: spmp
item.description: A YouTube Music client with a focus on customisation of colours and song metadata.

item.title: spmp
item.description: Lightweight Spotify client using Qt.

item.title: Helio
item.description: Free and open-source music sequencer for desktop and mobile platforms

item.title: deezer-desktop
item.description: An universal linux port of deezer, supporting Flatpak, Appimage, Snap, RPM, DEB.

item.title: Nora
item.description: An elegant music player built using Electron and React

item.title: Stargate
item.description: Innovation-first digital audio workstation (DAW), instrument and effect plugins, wave editor.

item.title: Avidemux
item.description: Avidemux is a free video editor designed for simple cutting, filtering and encoding tasks

item.title: LMMS
item.description: LMMS is an open-source cross-platform digital audio workstation designed for music production.
